𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗕𝗟𝗢𝗚 | To automate and enhance the production of high-quality, SEO-optimized blog content using AI, ensuring it meets stringent quality and platform-specific requirements.  ✨ Notable!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate and enhance the production of high-quality, SEO-optimized blog content using AI, ensuring it meets stringent quality and platform-specific requirements.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered blog content creation, optimization, and auditing
✅ Dual optimization for Google rankings (E-E-A-T) and AI citations
✅ v1.9.0 5-gate Blog Delivery Contract for quality assurance
✅ 30 sub-skills and 5 agents for comprehensive blog workflow
✅ Multiple content templates and on-demand references
✅ 160+ passing tests for reliability
✅ Open-source (MIT license) and community-supported versions available


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 904 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 186 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The claude-blog repository provides a comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools for writing, optimizing, and auditing blog content. It aims to produce high-quality articles that are dual-optimized for search engine rankings and AI citation platforms, ensuring content meets specific quality standards through a multi-stage delivery contract.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-blog

Storyboarder is a JavaScript application designed to help creators visualize stories quickly through simple drawing tools. It allows users to create storyboards from scratch or by importing Fountain screenplays, facilitating rapid iteration and sharing of visual ideas without the complexity of professional animation software.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

PhantomBot is an open-source, Java-powered Twitch bot designed to enhance live streams with interactive features and robust moderation. It offers a built-in web panel for easy management, a customizable point system, games, raffles, and integration with popular streaming services.

𝗚𝗟𝗠-𝗢𝗖𝗥 | Accurate and fast optical character recognition (OCR) for complex documents, including tables, formulas, and information extraction.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Accurate and fast optical character recognition (OCR) for complex documents, including tables, formulas, and information extraction.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: May 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ State-of-the-Art Performance on document understanding benchmarks
✅ Optimized for Real-World Scenarios (complex tables, code-heavy documents, seals)
✅ Efficient Inference with 0.9B parameters, supporting vLLM, SGLang, and Ollama
✅ Easy to Use with open-sourced SDK, simple installation, and one-line invocation


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 6.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 633 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 27 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GLM-OCR is a powerful multimodal OCR model designed for complex document understanding. It leverages a GLM-V architecture with advanced training techniques like Multi-Token Prediction and reinforcement learning to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency. The model is optimized for real-world scenarios and offers easy integration through an open-source SDK.

𝗭𝗢𝗧 | To provide a compliant and robust registry for storing and serving OCI container images and artifacts.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a compliant and robust registry for storing and serving OCI container images and artifacts.
📅 Created: Jun 2019 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ OCI-native container image registry
✅ Production-ready
✅ Vendor-neutral
✅ Purely based on OCI Distribution Specification
✅ Stores images in OCI image format


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 215 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 45 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

zot is a production-ready, vendor-neutral OCI-native container image registry. It strictly adheres to the OCI Image Format and Distribution Specification, ensuring compatibility and interoperability without proprietary extensions.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪
